records.ety: [L. eminentia, fr. eminens eminent: cf. F. minence.]

defs: That which is eminent or lofty; a high ground or place; a height.
quotes: The temple of honor ought to be seated on an eminence.

defs: An elevated condition among men; a place or station above men in general, either in rank, office, or celebrity; social or moral loftiness; high rank; distinction; preferment.
quotes: You 've too a woman's heart, which ever yet Affected eminence, wealth, sovereignty.

defs: A title of honor, especially applied to a cardinal in the Roman Catholic Church.
